Design_Description: Add three learnable log-variance parameters (`log_var_joints`, `log_var_depth`, `log_var_uv`) to the head; replace fixed-weight loss terms with Kendall & Gal homoscedastic uncertainty weighting on all three tasks.
Add learnable log-variance parameters for depth and UV tasks only; joint loss kept at fixed weight 1.0, preventing the primary task from being spuriously down-weighted.

Depth and UV tasks get learnable uncertainty weights; joint loss uses a fixed multiplier of 2.0 (= 0.67/0.33) to reflect the composite metric's intended task weighting as a prior before uncertainty adaptation.
